ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a secret as token for this repository (optional)
ast.target: 为此仓库选择一个密钥作为令牌（可选）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled beta plugins will be automatically enabled after installtion by default. Note: you can toggle this on and off for each plugin in the "add plugin" form.
ast.target: 如果启用，测试版插件将在安装后默认自动启用。注意：您可以在“添加插件”表单中为每个插件单独开关此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all beta plugins will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts. Note: this does not update frozen version plugins.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时都会检查所有测试版插件的更新。注意：这不会更新冻结版本插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all beta themes will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时都会检查所有 Beta 主题的更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled the latest version will be selected by default when adding a new plugin.
ast.target: 如果启用，添加新插件时将默认选择最新版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, plugins with higher app versions will be allowed to be installed. Also it allows desktop-only plugins to be installed on mobile devices.
ast.target: 如果启用，将允许安装需要更高应用版本的插件，也允许在移动设备上安装仅限桌面的插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BRAT will provide popup notifications for its various activities. Turn this off means no notifications.
ast.target: BRAT 会为其各种活动提供弹窗通知。关闭此选项意味着没有通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Plugin updates will be logged to a file in the log file.
ast.target: 插件更新将被记录到日志文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Logs will be saved to this file. Don't add .md to the file name.
ast.target: 日志将保存到此文件中。不要在文件名中添加 .md。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get a lot  more information in  the log.
ast.target: 在日志中获取更多详细信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Atomic bomb level console logging. Can be used for troubleshooting and development.
ast.target: 原子弹级别的控制台日志记录，可用于故障排除和开发。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Select latest plugin version by default
ast.target: 默认选择最新插件版本

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 仓库（示例：https://GitHub.com/github用户名/仓库名称）

ast.target: 仓库（示例：https://github.com/GitHub用户名/仓库名称）

ast.name: setText
ast.target: Beta 版插件的 GitHub 仓库：

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter a GitHub repository address to validate it.
ast.target: 输入 GitHub 仓库地址以进行验证。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Error: No releases found in this repository.
ast.target: 错误：此仓库中未找到任何发行版。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Repository not found. Check the address or provide a valid token for access to a private repository.
ast.target: 未找到仓库。请检查地址，或提供有效的令牌以访问私有仓库。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Access denied. Check your personal access token.
ast.target: 访问被拒绝。请检查您的个人访问令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template

ast.name: message
ast.source: Token lacks required scopes. Check documentation for requirements.
ast.target: 令牌缺少所需的作用域。请查看文档了解要求。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Add a beta plugin for testing (with or without version)
ast.target: 插件：添加一个用于测试的测试版插件（带或不带版本号）

ast.target: 插件：仅检查测试版插件的更新，但不更新

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Choose a single plugin version to update
ast.target: 插件：选择单个插件版本进行更新

ast.source: Plugins: Choose a single plugin to reinstall
ast.target: 插件：选择单个插件重新安装

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Restart a plugin that is already installed
ast.target: 插件：重启已安装的插件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Disable a plugin - toggle it off
ast.target: 插件：禁用插件 - 将其关闭

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugins: Enable a plugin - toggle it on
ast.target: 插件：启用插件 - 将其打开

ast.target: 插件：打开插件的 GitHub 仓库

ast.name: name
ast.source: Themes: Grab a beta theme for testing from a Github repository
ast.target: 主题：从 GitHub 仓库获取测试版主题

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following is a list of beta plugins added via the command "add a beta plugin for testing". You can chose to add the latest version or a frozen version. A frozen version is a specific release of a plugin based on its release tag.
ast.target: 以下是通过命令“添加一个用于测试的Beta版插件”添加的Beta版插件列表。您可以选择添加最新版本或冻结版本。冻结版本是基于其发布标签的特定插件版本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the "edit" button next to a plugin to change the installed version. Click the "X" button next to a plugin to remove it from the list.
ast.target: 点击插件旁边的“编辑”按钮以更改已安装的版本。点击插件旁边的“X”按钮以将其从列表中移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Removing from the list does not delete the plugin, this should be done from the Community Plugins tab in Settings.
ast.target: 从列表中移除不会删除该插件，这应在设置中的社区插件选项卡中完成。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 您的 GitHub 账户设置

ast.target: 令牌名称已配置但密钥缺失。请添加密钥或更新插件配置。
